name: GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
summary: Goldman Sachs is a leading global financial institution providing investment banking, securities intermediation, asset management, and wealth management services to corporations, financial institutions, governments, and individuals. The firm operates through three segments: Global Banking & Markets (advisory, underwriting, FICC, equities), Asset & Wealth Management (management fees, private banking, investments), and Platform Solutions (credit cards, deposits). Its platform Marquee provides institutional investors with market intelligence and trade execution.

products.name: Marquee
products.description: Digital platform providing institutional investors with market intelligence, risk analytics, proprietary datasets and trade execution across multiple asset classes.

products.name: Advisory Services
products.description: Strategic advisory for mergers and acquisitions, divestitures, corporate defense, restructurings and spin-offs.

products.name: Equity Underwriting
products.description: Underwriting of common stock, preferred stock, convertible and exchangeable securities including IPOs.

products.name: Debt Underwriting
products.description: Origination and underwriting of investment-grade, high-yield debt, bank loans, structured and emerging-market securities.

products.name: FICC Intermediation
products.description: Market-making in interest rate products, credit products, mortgages, currencies and commodities in cash and derivative instruments.

products.name: Equities Intermediation
products.description: Market-making and financing in equity products including cash equities, equity derivatives and prime brokerage.

products.name: Transaction Banking
products.description: Banking services for institutional clients including cash management and related transaction services.

products.name: Apple Card
products.description: Consumer credit card issued to Apple Card customers, reported under Platform Solutions segment.

products.name: Global Investment Research
products.description: Fundamental research covering approximately 3,000 companies worldwide and approximately 50 national economies, industries, currencies and commodities.

products.name: Asset & Wealth Management
products.description: Management fees, incentive fees, private banking, lending and investment services for institutional and individual clients.

partnerships.description: Goldman Sachs issues Apple Card credit cards to Apple Card customers and raises deposits in connection with this program.
